titlestmt.titleproper: First Presbyterian Church of Havana records6083
titlestmt.author: Compiled by S.L.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Presbyterian Church of Havana records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: First Presbyterian Church of Havana (Montour Falls, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Three volumes session meeting minutes (1829-1883) which include membership lists; one volume of trustee and annual meeting minutes (1829-1888); a subscription book (1841-1858) and a list (1853) and miscellaneous receipts, a program and a schedule.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The First Presbyterian Church of Havana was organized on February 18, 1829 with twenty-one members. The first building completed in 1832 was used until the construction of a new church in 1845.
See The History of Schuyler County p. 178 for details or the accessions folder fo a list of pastors.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Contains three vols. (bound together) of session meeting minutes (1829-1883) which include membership lists (item 1); 1 vol. of trustee and annual meeting minutes (1829-1888); a subscription book (1841-1858) and list (1853 - for the construction of a parsonage); and miscellaneous documents which include receipts for contributions to the Presbyterian Mission House (1878-80), a Sabbath School Program (1853), and a copy of the General Assembly's schedule for 1874-75.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Presbyterian Church of Havana records, #6083. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Montour Falls (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
Schuyler County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Presbyterian church buildings.
Presbyterian Church -- Membership.
Presbyterian Church -- New York (State) -- Montour Falls.

did.unittitle: Records of the First Presbyterian Church in Havana, Tioga County, New York

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In three volumes. Contains session meeting minutes which list moderator and elders in attendance, the acceptance and dismissal of members, baptisms and occasional cases of church discipline. Articles of Faith, church covenant and membership lists are also included. Items of note are as follows:

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Account of the formation of the church by representatives of the Presbytery of Bath on February 18, 1829.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles of Faith.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Covenant .

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: April 3, 1829. Session meetings commence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: March 28, 1830. 14 new members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: April 25, 1830. 10 new members

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: February 11, 1831. 11 members are granted leave to joint a Protestant Dutch Reformed Church being formed in Catlin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: December 25, 1832. New Confession of Faith and Covenant adopted.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: December 25, 29, 1832. 16 new members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: January 30, 1833. Presbytery examines records and makes several suggestions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: February 28, 1835. Last legible minutes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "A Catalogue of the Members ..." Includes names and if dismissed or died.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles of Faith and Covenant adopted December 10, 1835 (see p. 24).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Catalogue of members" lists names, how received, when and where to dismissed, died, suspended or excommunicated. (1853-1898).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records commence. February 28, 1835.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: New Articles of Faith and Covenant adopted. See pp. 1-6.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Voted to copy into new book all records after January 27, 1835.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pages mis-numbered.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: January 1, 1836. Temperance resolution.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: January - February 1844. Many new members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: April 27, 1856. Last entry.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Catalogue of Baptised Children" includes name of child and parents and date of baptism.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Catalogue of members" continued from p. 20.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes commence. May 1, 1857.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: July 31, 1863. Appeal from two Civil War refugees from Fredericks-burg, Va.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: March 17, 1868. Methods for conversion are discussed.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: February 7, 1870. Resolution on supporting missions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: March 1876. Resolution on the participation of women in church social meetings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: June 15, 1876. Revival?

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: March 16, 1883. Last minutes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Blank pages not rebound or filmed.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Record of baptisms listing name or date. 1862-1882.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of contributions for 1867, 68, 71 and 72. List of collections taken 1861-1866.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Catalog of members" lists name, when joined, by letter or profession, where from and memoranda. 1835-1882.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Benevolent contributions 1876-1879.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains minutes of annual meetings to elect trustees which record who is elected and resolutions to the board of trustees. Items of note include:

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church incorporates as the First Presbyterian Church in Havana. There will be 7 trustees and annual meetings held on the first Tuesday in February.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Plans are made to finance a new church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolved to hire a preacher.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A minister is hired.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Plans are made to buy a lot and build a new meeting house.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolved to build a parsonage.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Plans are made to repair and remodel the house of worship.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a list of accounts of members due, member's accounts paid, pastor's salary paid and pews rented.

did.unittitle: Receipts from the Presbyterian Mission House. 1878, 79, 80.
"Sabbath School Anniversary of Havana, Wednesday, July 13, 1853." Program.
